records.question: Which projects named Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle have Michael Rogers assigned to them and require at most 156 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE scientists.name = 'Michael Rogers' AND projects.hours <= 156 AND projects.name = 'Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT projects.Code 
FROM Projects 
JOIN AssignedTo ON Projects.Code = AssignedTo.Project 
JOIN Scientists ON AssignedTo.Scientist = Scientists.SSN 
WHERE Projects.Hours <= 156 
  AND Projects.Name = 'Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle' 
  AND Scientists.Name = 'Michael Rogers'

records.question: Which projects require exactly 789 hours and involve the scientist George ODonnell?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE projects.hours = 789 AND scientists.name = 'George ODonnell'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.Code 
FROM Projects p 
JOIN AssignedTo a ON p.Code = a.Project 
JOIN Scientists s ON a.Scientist = s.SSN 
WHERE p.Hours = 789 AND s.Name = 'George ODonnell'

records.question: Which projects named Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase that are assigned to Mary-Anne Foster require at most 321 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE projects.hours <= 321 AND scientists.name = 'Mary-Anne Foster' AND projects.name = 'Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Projects.Code 
FROM Projects 
JOIN AssignedTo ON Projects.Code = AssignedTo.Project 
JOIN Scientists ON AssignedTo.Scientist = Scientists.SSN 
WHERE Projects.Hours <= 321 
AND Projects.Name = 'Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase' 
AND Scientists.Name = 'Mary-Anne Foster'

records.question: Which scientists are assigned to the project named A Silver-Cleaning Battery?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE projects.name = 'A Silver-Cleaning Battery'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Projects.Code 
FROM Projects 
JOIN AssignedTo ON Projects.Code = AssignedTo.Project 
JOIN Scientists ON AssignedTo.Scientist = Scientists.SSN 
WHERE Projects.Name = 'A Silver-Cleaning Battery' 
GROUP BY Projects.Code
